# ECV Handyman Services

> Professional, licensed, and insured handyman services serving Chicago and the western suburbs. Owner-operated by Enrique "Ricky" Vargas with over 15 years of experience.

## Contact

- Phone: (708) 497-8893
- Email: ecvargas2521@gmail.com
- Website: https://ecvhandymanservices.com
- Google Business Profile: 4.7 stars

## Hours

- Monday-Friday: 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM
- Saturday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- Sunday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Emergency service: 24/7

## Services

- Plumbing Repairs: Leak repair, faucet replacement, toilet installation, pipe repair, water heater service, drain cleaning, garbage disposal repair
- Electrical Work: Outlet and switch installation, light fixture installation, ceiling fan installation, GFCI outlets, wiring and rewiring, panel upgrades
- Painting & Finishing: Interior painting, exterior painting, cabinet painting, trim and molding, deck staining, color consultation
- Carpentry: Custom woodwork, trim and crown molding, door and window installation, shelving, deck building and repair, shiplap and accent walls
- Home Repairs: Drywall repair and installation, door repair, window repair, fixture installation, weather stripping, seasonal maintenance
- Construction & Renovation: Bathroom renovations, kitchen remodels, room additions, basement finishing, full-room renovations

## Service Areas

- Chicago, IL
- Oak Park, IL (ZIP: 60301, 60302, 60303, 60304)
- Cicero, IL (ZIP: 60804)
- Berwyn, IL (ZIP: 60402)
- Forest Park, IL (ZIP: 60130)
- Maywood, IL (ZIP: 60153)
- River Forest, IL (ZIP: 60305)
- Melrose Park, IL (ZIP: 60160, 60161)
- Service radius: approximately 20 miles from Chicago

## About

ECV Handyman Services was established in 2009. The business is owner-operated by Enrique "Ricky" Vargas, who has over 15 years of hands-on experience. The company is fully licensed and insured in the state of Illinois. Bilingual service available in English and Spanish.

## What Makes ECV Different

- Owner does the work personally — no subcontractors
- Same-day emergency service available
- Transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden fees
- Treats every home like his own
- Consistently rated 4.7+ stars on Google
- Serves both homeowners and landlords/property managers

## Pricing

- Handyman rates: competitive hourly rates, typically $50-$85/hour depending on the job
- Free estimates provided for all projects
- Payment accepted: cash, check, credit card

## Customer Reviews Summary

Customers consistently praise Ricky for quick response times, honest pricing, high-quality workmanship, and friendly service. Common themes in reviews include reliability, professionalism, and willingness to go above and beyond.
